market_overview.tape: S&P 500 sits ~0.5% below its June 2 record (~7,621 all-time high a month ago) after wild swings; leadership is narrow and concentrated in AI/semis (XLK leading, XLC lagging). The engine tags the tape neutral/range-bound — defensible, though it understates the melt-up.
market_overview.risk_tone: mixed — cautiously risk-on with a stretched-valuation tail (AI 'speculation at extreme levels')
market_overview.earnings_cluster: Heavy prints land right at/after these swing windows: GEV Jul 22 (pre-mkt), META + MSFT Jul 29 (post), AAPL Jul 30 (post), NVDA ~Aug 25, PLTR Aug 10. Event risk dominates late July for this watchlist.
handle_with_care: META — Jul 28 print + Jul 29 FOMC sit at the edge of the 10-bar window; breakout into resistance.
MSFT — Jul 29 earnings AND FOMC on the SAME day; reversal setup still 'forming'.
AAPL — Jul 30 print (Tim Cook's last call as CEO) with engine grade D / trap 85 ('likely trap, skip').
GEV — counter-trend SHORT into a Strong-Buy name reporting Jul 22 with a ~163% avg beat; knife-catch.
DG — 2-bar short with a 0.1 R:R while analysts carry a ~$135 target ABOVE spot.
Jul 29 FOMC (hold at 3.5-3.75% expected) is a whole-market event inside several windows.
market_overview.macro: FOMC Jul 28-29; decision Jul 29 2pm ET — hold at 3.5-3.75% expected (4th straight, no SEP). Year-end S&P targets diverge widely: BofA 7,100 (below spot), JPMorgan 7,800, Yardeni 8,250.

NVDA.narrative: Engine read: S/R Breakout long, verdict TAKE (conviction 92, grade B, trap 31) — a clean, high-conviction continuation. Entry 210.99, stop 204.57, target 226.36 (R:R 2.4). The AI concurs: Strong-Buy consensus and a ~$284-303 average target sit well above entry, and — importantly — the Aug 25 print lands AFTER the ~15-bar window, so this trade should be flat before the binary event. The one caveat is a stretched broad tape.
NVDA.reconciliation: Technical TAKE and AI both bullish — no divergence. The AI adds that the earnings risk is OUT of the trade window (a plus), and the only live risk is a market-wide valuation snapback in the AI cohort.

META.narrative: Engine read: Squeeze Breakout long, verdict WATCH (conviction 85, grade C, trap 53) — a coiled continuation that hasn't triggered yet. Entry 669.25, stop 628.43, target 725.20 (R:R 1.37). The AI is bullish on the name (Strong Buy, ~$823 average target) but respects the WATCH: the Jul 28 print + Jul 29 FOMC sit right at the edge of the window, so a clean breakout should confirm BEFORE you take on that binary risk.
META.reconciliation: Engine WATCH (wait for confirmation) and AI agree it's bullish-but-not-yet. The AI's added value is the calendar: entering late enough that the Jul 28/29 events land inside the hold turns a clean setup into a coin-flip — confirm early or stand aside.

AAPL.narrative: This is where the AI pushes back hardest. The engine lists a Squeeze Breakout long at entry 315.32, stop 302.52, target 333.48 (R:R 1.42), but verdict is only WATCH and quality is grade D with trap 85 — 'likely trap, skip.' The AI agrees: a laggard in a leading sector, a low-quality breakout, and a Jul 30 print (Cook's final call as CEO) just outside the window. Analyst tone is a mild Buy, but that isn't enough to override a trap-flagged setup.
AAPL.reconciliation: alignment 'agree': the engine did NOT say take (WATCH + trap 85), and the AI concurs it isn't a clean long. The size_hint is trim — treat any entry as low-conviction and demand confirmation.

PLTR.narrative: Engine read: S/R Breakout long, verdict WATCH (conviction 86, grade D, trap 69). Entry 126.75, stop 122.59, target 149.79 — a wide R:R of 5.54 if it runs. The AI is constructive on the name (Buy, PT band ~$174-194) but cautionary on THIS entry: a grade-D breakout on thin trigger volume in a high-beta name. The Aug 10 print is safely outside the window, so the risk is tape/quality, not earnings.
PLTR.reconciliation: Engine WATCH and AI agree it isn't a clean go yet. The big 5.54 R:R is attractive, but the trim size_hint reflects grade-D quality and thin confirmation — wait for the breakout to prove itself.
